    M

    main(String[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.ArticleGUI
    Entry point to launch the ArticleGUI independently for testing.

    Main method - entry point of the application.
    main(String[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.scan.ScanServer
     
    Main - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.main
    Main entry point for VEBO Lagersystem application.
    MainGUI - Klasse in ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis
    Modern Main Dashboard for VEBO Lagersystem with Tabbed Interface
    MainGUI() - Konstruktor für Klasse ch.framedev.lagersystem.guis.MainGUI
    Constructs the main GUI window for the VEBO Lagersystem application.
    map(ResultSet) - Methode in Schnittstelle ch.framedev.lagersystem.managers.DatabaseManager.ResultMapper
    Map the current row of the ResultSet to an object of type T.
